info.title: Layouts API
info.description: CRUD operations on Layout customization for modules in Zoho CRM. Supports getting the details of all layouts or a specific layout of a module, updating a layout, deactivating/activating a layout, and deleting a layout.

get.summary: Get all layouts metadata for a module
get.description:
Retrieves comprehensive details of all layouts associated with a specified module in your Zoho CRM account. Returns layout configuration including sections, fields, profiles, and permissions in a single response without pagination.

**Important Notes:**
- The `profiles` array will be `null` if the user does not have "Module Customization" permission in their profile.
- For Deals module: When the pipeline feature is enabled, multiple layouts exist per pipeline. Each pipeline can have its own set of layouts.
- The `mode` parameter supports different values based on module type. Common modes include `business_card` and `quick_create`.
- Score and Visit Summary sections are system-generated and read-only.
- All layouts for the module are returned in a single response; pagination is not supported.

get.summary: Get a specific layout metadata by ID
get.description:
Retrieves comprehensive details of a specific layout by its unique identifier for a specified module in your Zoho CRM account. Returns layout configuration including sections, fields, profiles, and permissions.

**Important Notes:**
- The `profiles` array will be `null` if the user does not have "Module Customization" permission in their profile.
- For Deals module: When the pipeline feature is enabled, multiple layouts exist per pipeline. Each pipeline can have its own set of layouts.
- The `mode` parameter supports different values based on module type. Common modes include `business_card` and `quick_create`.
- Score and Visit Summary sections are system-generated and read-only.

**Prerequisite:** The Layout ID can be obtained from the Get All Layouts API.

204.description: No Content - No associations match the specified filter criteria or the requested page number exceeds available results

patch.description: Update a custom layout in Zoho CRM. You can rename the layout, add/remove profile permissions, enable/disable business card, create/update/delete sections, and add/update/delete/move fields within sections. Limits: Maximum 5 sections per request and maximum 5 fields total across all sections per request.

requestBody.description: Layout update request body containing the layout modifications. Only a single layout can be updated per request. Maximum 5 sections and 5 fields (total across all sections) can be modified per request.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data or parameters provided

403.description: Forbidden - User lacks required permissions to update the layout

405.description: Method Not Allowed - Invalid request method used

delete.description: Deletes a custom layout from a module in Zoho CRM. When deleting a layout that has associated records, you must specify a `transfer_to` layout ID to transfer those records. If the layout has an associated pipeline, you must also provide `pipeline` and `stage` parameters. The `transfer_to` parameter is only optional when the layout is deactivated and has no records associated with it. Note: The standard layout cannot be deleted.

403.description: Forbidden - User lacks required permissions to delete the layout

LayoutIdParameter.name: id
LayoutIdParameter.description: Unique identifier of the layout. Must be a valid 64-bit integer represented as a string. Can be obtained from the Get Layouts API.

ModuleParameter.name: module
ModuleParameter.description: Specify the API name of the required module. Supports both standard modules (Leads, Accounts, Contacts, Deals, Campaigns, Tasks, Cases, Events, Calls, Solutions, Products, Vendors, Price_Books, Quotes, Sales_Orders, Purchase_Orders, Invoices, Appointments, Services) and custom modules. Module API names are case-insensitive, can contain alphanumeric characters and underscores, must not contain spaces, and have a maximum length of 50 characters. Use the GET - Modules Metadata API to retrieve all available module API names.

ModeParameter.name: mode
ModeParameter.description:
Filter layouts by mode. Available modes vary by module type:
- `business_card`: Business card layout view
- `quick_create`: Quick create form layout
- `all`: Request all available modes

If not provided, the default mode for the module will be applied. Note: Mode availability depends on the module and its configuration.

TransferToParameter.name: transfer_to
TransferToParameter.description: The ID of the layout to which records associated with the layout being deleted should be transferred. This parameter is conditionally mandatory - it is required when the layout has records associated with it. It is only optional when the layout is deactivated and has no records associated. The target layout must be an active layout; transferring to a deactivated layout is not allowed.

PipelineParameter.name: pipeline
PipelineParameter.description: The ID of the pipeline to transfer records to. This parameter is conditionally mandatory - it must be provided along with the `stage` parameter when the layout being deleted has an associated pipeline. Required for modules like Deals that support pipeline stages.

StageParameter.name: stage
StageParameter.description: The ID of the stage within the pipeline to transfer records to. This parameter is conditionally mandatory - it must be provided along with the `pipeline` parameter when the layout being deleted has an associated pipeline. The stage must be a valid stage within the specified pipeline.

Includes.name: include
Includes.description: Specifies additional data to include in the response.

IncludeInnerDetails.name: include_inner_details
IncludeInnerDetails.description: Specifies additional inner details to include in the response. Accepts a comma-separated list of dot-notation paths indicating which nested properties should return extended information.

LayoutSuccessResponse.description: Successfully retrieved all layouts for the specified module. Returns complete layout metadata including sections, fields, profiles, and permissions. Note: The `profiles` array will be `null` if the user lacks Module Customization permission. All layouts are returned in a single response without pagination.

BadRequest.description: Bad Request - Invalid or missing parameters.

code.description: Error code indicating the type of bad request

details.description: Additional details about the error, such as the missing or invalid parameter name

param_name.description: Name of the parameter that caused the error

status.description: Status of the response, always 'error' for error responses

DeleteLayoutSuccessResponse.description: Layout deleted successfully. The response contains the ID of the deleted layout.

DeleteLayoutBadRequestResponse.description: Bad Request - Invalid or missing parameters, or operation not allowed

UnauthorizedResponse.description: Unauthorized - Authentication failed or invalid credentials

schema.description: Error response for invalid URL patterns

code.description: Error code indicating invalid URL pattern

details.description: Additional details about the URL error

status.description: Status of the response, always 'error' for error responses

InternalServerErrorResponse.description: Internal Server Error - An unexpected error occurred on the server

change_tab_traversal.description: Permission to change tab traversal order

default.description: Indicates if this is the default profile for the layout

ConvertMappingModule.description:
Convert mapping configuration that defines how records are mapped during conversion. The structure varies based on the module type:
- **Leads module**: Maps to Contacts, Deals, and Accounts modules during lead conversion.
- **Quotes module**: Maps to SalesOrders and Invoices modules during quote conversion.
- **Sales_Orders module**: Maps to Invoices module during sales order conversion.

oneOf.title: Leads Convert Mapping
oneOf.description: Lead conversion mapping configuration for mapping lead data to Contacts, Deals, and Accounts modules.

oneOf.title: Quotes Convert Mapping
oneOf.description: Quote conversion mapping configuration for mapping quote data to SalesOrders and Invoices modules.

oneOf.title: Sales Orders Convert Mapping
oneOf.description: Sales order conversion mapping configuration for mapping sales order data to Invoices module.

oneOf.title: No Convert Mapping
oneOf.description: Empty object indicating no convert mapping is configured for this field. Returned for fields in modules that do not support conversion or fields that are not mapped during conversion.

Only returned when the query parameter `include_inner_details=fields.allowed_permissions_to_update` is specified in the request.

read_write.description: Indicates whether the read_write permission can be assigned. When true, users can be granted full read and write access to the field.

hidden.description: Indicates whether the hidden permission can be assigned. When true, the field can be configured to be hidden from users.

read_only.description: Indicates whether the read_only permission can be assigned. When true, users can be granted view-only access to the field.

convert_mapping.description:
Field-level convert mapping configuration that defines how this field's value is mapped to corresponding fields in target modules during record conversion. The structure varies based on the source module:
- **Leads module fields**: Maps to Contacts, Deals, and Accounts modules.
- **Quotes module fields**: Maps to Invoices and Sales_Orders modules.
- **Sales_Orders module fields**: Maps to Invoices module.

A string value indicates the target field API name. A null value indicates no mapping exists for that target module.

oneOf.title: Leads Field Convert Mapping
oneOf.description: Field convert mapping for Leads module fields to Contacts, Deals, and Accounts.

Contacts.description: Target field API name in the Contacts module, or null if no mapping exists.

oneOf.description: API name of the target field in Contacts module.

Deals.description: Target field API name in the Deals module, or null if no mapping exists.

oneOf.description: API name of the target field in Deals module.

Accounts.description: Target field API name in the Accounts module, or null if no mapping exists.

oneOf.description: API name of the target field in Accounts module.

oneOf.title: Quotes Field Convert Mapping
oneOf.description: Field convert mapping for Quotes module fields to Invoices and Sales_Orders.

Invoices.description: Target field API name in the Invoices module, or null if no mapping exists.

oneOf.description: API name of the target field in Invoices module.

Sales_Orders.description: Target field API name in the Sales_Orders module, or null if no mapping exists.

oneOf.description: API name of the target field in Sales_Orders module.

oneOf.title: Sales Orders Field Convert Mapping
oneOf.description: Field convert mapping for Sales_Orders module fields to Invoices.

formula.description: Formula field configuration for calculated values based on other fields

dynamic.description: Indicates if the formula is dynamically evaluated. When true, the formula is recalculated on each access rather than stored.

stop_compute_conditionally.description: Indicates if the formula computation should stop based on a condition defined in stop_compute_expression.

hipaa_compliance_enabled.description: Indicates if HIPAA compliance is enabled for the field

query_details.description: Query configuration for filtering lookup field options. Contains the query ID and criteria used to filter available lookup values.

oneOf.description: Query configuration for filtering lookup options based on specified criteria.

query_id.description: Unique identifier of the query used to filter lookup options.

criteria.description: Filter criteria configuration for the lookup query.

comparator.description: Comparison operator used to evaluate the field value against the specified value.

field.description: Reference to the field being used in the filter criteria.

api_name.description: API name of the field used in the criteria.

id.description: Unique identifier of the field used in the criteria.

type.description: Type of the criteria value. Indicates whether the value is a static value or a field reference.

value.description: The value to compare against. Can be a string, number, or boolean depending on the field type.

oneOf.description: String value for the criteria comparison.
Numeric value for the criteria comparison.
Boolean value for the criteria comparison.
The number of decimal places for the field

mass_update.description: Indicates if mass update is enabled for the field

oneOf.description: Multi-module lookup details of the field

linking_details.description: Linking details for the multi-module lookup

module.description: Module details for the multi-module lookup

plural_label.description: The plural label of the module

lookup_field.description: Lookup field details for the multi-module lookup

field_label.description: The field label of the lookup field

connected_lookup_field.description: Connected lookup field details for the multi-module lookup

field_label.description: The field label of the connected lookup field

connected_details.description: Connected details for the multi-module lookup

field.description: Field details for the multi-module lookup

field_label.description: The field label of the field

module.description: Module details for the multi-module lookup

plural_label.description: The plural label of the module

layouts.description: List of layouts associated with the multi-module lookup

items.description: Layout details for the multi-module lookup

related_list.description: Related list details for the multi-module lookup

display_label.description: Display label of the related list

oneOf.description: Auto number details of the field

starting_number_length.description: The length of the starting number

oneOf.description: The prefix for the auto number
The starting number for the auto number
The suffix for the auto number

quick_sequence_number.description: The quick sequence number of the field

blueprint_supported.description: Indicates if the field supports blueprint

MaskDetailsProfile.description: Profile that has permission to view the unmasked field value.

id.description: Unique identifier of the profile.

layouts.description: Array containing all layout objects for the specified module. Ordered by layout name.

has_more_profiles.description: Indicates if there are more profiles than shown

oneOf.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset when the layout was created

visible.description: Indicates if the layout is visible to users

oneOf.description: To identify which integration the layout is created for

portal_user_types.description: List of portal user types associated with this layout. Only returned when the query parameter `include=portal_user_types` is specified in the request.

items.description: Portal user type configuration for the layout

default.description: Indicates if this is the default portal user type for the layout

name.description: Name of the portal user type

id.description: Unique identifier of the portal user type

_default_view.description: Default view configuration for this portal user type

id.description: Unique identifier of the default view

oneOf.description: List of profiles associated with this layout. Will be null if user lacks Module Customization permission. No guaranteed order; use id for uniqueness.
User who created the layout

sections.description: Layout sections containing field groups and configuration. Includes system sections like Score and Visit Summary which are read-only. Ordered by sequence_number in ascending order.

items.description: Details of an individual section within the layout

isSubformSection.description: Indicates if this section is a subform

parent_section.description: Reference to the parent section when this section is nested within another section (e.g., collapsible subsections). Null when the section is a top-level section.

oneOf.description: Parent section reference for nested sections.

id.description: Unique identifier of the parent section.

display_label.description: User-facing display name of the section

sequence_number.description: Order of the section within the layout. Generally starts from 1, but may have gaps.

actions_allowed.description: Permissions for section operations. System sections (Score, Visit Summary) will have restricted permissions.

tab_traversal.description: Direction of tab key navigation within the section

api_name.description: API identifier for the section

column_count.description: Number of columns in the section layout

is_parent_section.description: Indicates whether this section is a parent section that can contain nested child sections. When true, other sections can reference this section via the parent_section property.

generated_type.description: Indicates if the section is system-generated or user-created

fields.description: Fields within this section. Ordered by sequence_number in ascending order.

show_business_card.description: Indicates if business card view is enabled for this layout

actions_allowed.description: Permissions indicating which operations are allowed on this layout

oneOf.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset when the layout was last modified

api_name.description: API name of the layout

oneOf.description: User who last modified the layout

generated_type.description: Indicates if the layout is system-generated or user-created

total_profiles.description: Total number of profiles associated with this layout. Only returned when the query parameter `include=total_profiles` is specified in the request.

ErrorDetails.description: Additional context-specific error details. Properties vary based on error type.

param_name.description: Name of the parameter that caused the error.

id.description: Resource ID related to the error, if applicable.

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the parameter.

supported_values.description: List of supported values when applicable.

dependee.description: Details about the parameter that the missing dependent parameter depends on.

param_name.description: Name of the dependee parameter that requires the dependent parameter to be specified.

resource_path_index.description: Index in the resource path where the error occurred. Typically indicates the position of the invalid ID in the URL path.

permissions.description: List of permissions required to perform the action. Returned when the user lacks necessary permissions.

items.description: Permission identifier required for the action.

LayoutErrorDetails.description: Error details specific to layout operations. Properties vary based on error type.

action.description: Action that was attempted when the error occurred.

id.description: Resource ID related to the error, if applicable.

resource_path_index.description: Index in the resource path where the error occurred. Typically indicates the position of the invalid ID in the URL path.

param_name.description: Name of the parameter that caused the error.

DeleteLayoutSuccessResponseBody.description: Response body for successful layout deletion.

layouts.description: Array containing the result of the layout deletion operation.

DeleteLayoutResult.description: Result of a single layout deletion operation.

code.description: Response code indicating the result of the operation.

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted layout.

UpdateLayoutRequest.description: Request body for updating a layout. Only a single layout can be updated per request.

layouts.description: Array containing exactly one layout object with update properties. Only single layout updates are supported per request.

LayoutUpdateObject.description: Layout object containing the fields to update. At least one property must be provided. Maximum 5 sections and 5 fields (total across all sections) can be modified per request.

name.description: New name for the layout. Must be unique within the module.

show_business_card.description: Enable or disable the business card display for this layout.

profiles.description: Array of profile objects to add or remove from the layout.

sections.description: Array of section objects to create, update, or delete. Maximum 5 sections allowed per request. Total fields across all sections must not exceed 5.

ProfileUpdateObject.description: Profile object for adding or removing profile permissions.

id.description: Unique identifier of the profile.

_delete.description: Set to true to remove this profile's access to the layout.

SectionUpdateObject.description: Section object for creating, updating, or deleting sections. For creating a new section, provide name, display_label, sequence_number, tab_traversal, and column_count. For updating an existing section, provide id along with properties to update. For deleting a section, provide id and _delete object.

id.description: Unique identifier of the section. Required for updating or deleting existing sections. Omit when creating a new section.

name.description: Internal API name of the section. Required when creating a new section. Should be unique within the layout.

display_label.description: Display label shown in the UI for the section. Required when creating a new section.

sequence_number.description: Position/order of the section in the layout (1-based). Required when creating a new section. Lower numbers appear first.

tab_traversal.description: Tab traversal mode for the section. Defines how tab key navigation works within the section. 1 = column-wise, 2 = row-wise.

column_count.description: Number of columns in the section layout.

fields.description: Array of field objects to add, update, create, or remove from this section. Note: Total fields across all sections in the request must not exceed 5.

_delete.description: Delete configuration for removing the section. When provided, the section identified by id will be deleted.

FieldUpdateObject.description: Field object for adding, updating, creating, or removing fields from a section. For adding an existing field, provide only id. For updating field position, provide id and sequence_number. For creating a new field, provide field_label, data_type, and optionally length and sequence_number. For removing/moving a field, provide id and _delete object.

id.description: Unique identifier of an existing field. Required when adding, updating position, or removing an existing field. Omit when creating a new custom field.

field_label.description: Display label for the field. Required when creating a new custom field.

data_type.description: Data type of the field. Required when creating a new custom field. Determines the field's input type and validation.

length.description: Maximum length of the field value in characters. Applicable for text-type fields (text, textarea, richtextarea).

sequence_number.description: Position/order of the field within the section (1-based). Lower numbers appear first.

_delete.description: Delete configuration for removing the field. Set permanent to false to move to unused section (can be re-added later), true to permanently delete the field and its data.

permanent.description: If true, permanently deletes the resource. If false, moves it to unused section (for fields).

UpdateLayoutSuccessResponse.description: Successful response for layout update operation.

layouts.description: Array containing the result of the layout update operation.

LayoutUpdateSuccessResult.description: Success result for a layout update.

id.description: Unique identifier of the updated layout.

UpdateLayoutErrorResponse.description: Error response for layout update operation.

layouts.description: Array containing the error result of the layout update operation.

LayoutUpdateErrorResult.description: Error result for a layout update.

LayoutUpdateErrorDetails.description: Error details specific to layout update operations.

api_name.description: API name of the field that caused the error.

json_path.description: JSON path to the field that caused the error.

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the field.

maximum_length.description: Maximum allowed length for the field.

scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.convert_mapping.UPDATE: Update access to CRM layout convert mappings
